    Title

    How many photos or videos can the electronic button pin store?

    It can store up to 100 photos or 10 videos, each 3 seconds long.

    Can I loop videos or slideshows automatically?

    Yes! The device supports continuous looping of your uploaded photos or videos for dynamic, eye-catching display.

    What are the wearing options?

    1. Pin it on your clothes or bag

    2. Clip it to your hat or strap

    3. Use a lanyard or chain to wear it around your neck

    4. Use the stand on the back to display it on a table.

    How do I upload files to it?

    You can upload files using our dedicated app, or transfer them between devices directly.

    How long can it stay on standby?

    8 hours at normal brightness, or 16 hours at high brightness.

    Love how my eBadge necklace shows off my favorite pics — it’s like carrying my mood around my neck, and I’ve gotten so many compliments on it.

    Can’t wait to get two more eBadges — they’re just too fun to use. I’m already thinking about all the ways I can show different pics and switch them up every day

    I clipped my eBadge to my jacket and it instantly stole the show. I can change the display anytime, so it always fits my vibe.

    FAQS

    Electronic Button Pin Q&A

    What file formats are supported for stored content?

    It supports JPG, GIF, and PNG formats.

    What’s included in the package?

    Absolutely. We use durable, eco-friendly materials with smooth edges — safe for daily use and play.

    Touchscreen Electronic Button Pin (with built-in stand and pin), neck strap for wearing, user manual and Type-C charging cable

    How long does shipping take?

    Orders are usually processed within 1–3 business days. Delivery typically takes 5–10 business days, depending on your location.

    How can I track my order?

    Once your order ships, you'll receive a tracking link via email so you can follow its journey.

    What’s your return policy?

    We offer a 30-day return policy. If you’re not satisfied, you can return the item in its original condition for a refund.
